info.title: Available commands are:
info.description:
list        - List nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
import      - Import nuget package references of selected project.
export      - Export nuget package references of selected project.
remove      - remove specified nuget packages from selected solution.
update      - Update nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages
clone       - copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.
help <name> - For help with one of the above commands

commands.name: list
commands.description: - List nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages

options.name: --inconsistency
options.description:
check package with inconsistent versions, if true
errors out

options.name: --outdated
options.description: check any outdated packages, if true errors out.

options.name: --prereleased
options.description: check any pre-release packages, if true errors out.

options.name: --unpublished
options.description: check any unpublished packages, if true errors out.

commands.name: import
commands.description: - Import nuget package references of selected project.

options.name: --file
options.description: saved nuget reference json file path

options.name: --display
options.description: display 'install commands' only for selected file

commands.name: export
commands.description: - Export nuget package references of selected project.

options.name: --file
options.description: save packages referece list as json file

commands.name: remove
commands.description: - remove specified nuget packages from selected solution.

options.name: --display
options.description:
display 'remove commands' only for selected
package.

commands.name: update
commands.description: - Update nuget packages from selected solution & highlight the outdated packages

options.name: --display
options.description:
display 'update commands' only for selected
package.

commands.name: clone
commands.description:
- copy nuget packages from selected solution & install to the target project.
help <name> - For help with one of the above commands

options.name: --display
options.description:
run install command to clone packages to your
target csproj
